_comment: 《铃兰穿越记》001·v4又聋又哑版(story/arc-01·001《话我一句听不懂，命却押在他们嘴里》)。💣本集爆点=穿成豪门新娘+所有人说话她都听不懂——丈夫丢下一句决定她生死的话走了(观众全懂她不懂),她只能靠小桃的【比划把脉手势】猜出:有大夫要来查她。★口径(script-rules 1-2,用户2026-07-16最终锁定v4):看=懂(表情动作场景,汉字不认识)/听=不懂(噪音全靠猜)/说=零碎游客词/写=不会。本集她的信息来源逐拍自查:身份=【看】镜子+红嫁衣推出;丈夫的话=没听懂(b05观众端信息);死期=【看】小桃比划把脉手势【猜】出来——全集无一处'听懂'、无一处'认字'。★黄金3秒:首帧=红嫁衣猛睁眼,前4拍砸logline(听不懂+说不出的双绝境)。触发器:与我有关+生死利害+好奇缺口≥3。本集中文(观众端):你醒了。连戏:女主整集红嫁衣长发散;小桃=wardrobe v2七要素look(象牙白真丝缎蕾丝细吊带+雾霾蓝缎面高腰开衩短裙+金腰链+金圈耳环+细金项链+裸色高跟,低马尾齐刘海)。尾钩=开口就露馅的假新娘怎么骗过大夫的眼睛(=E02头钩)。⚠️仅脚本待审,未build未出图(用户指示先别出图)。

shots.content: A stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride in an ornate red traditional wedding dress with gold embroidery, red bridal veil pushed back off her face, long black hair loose and slightly disheveled, BOLTS UPRIGHT suddenly awake on a luxurious carved wooden wedding bed in a dim opulent Chinese mansion bedroom glowing with tall red dragon-and-phoenix wedding candles and gold double-happiness decorations, silk drapes around the bed, her eyes flying wide open in shock and terror, one hand clutching her chest, mouth parted gasping for breath, completely ALONE in the frame, NO other person, her single face in frame. Cinematic medium-wide shot. Landscape.

captions.local: Tôi là cô gái bán hoa người Việt
mở mắt ra đã thành tân nương hào môn

captions.zh: 这里的话，我一句听不懂
captions.local: Tiếng nơi này tôi chẳng nghe hiểu một câu

captions.zh: 我会说的，凑不齐一句话
captions.local: tiếng Trung tôi biết, góp không nổi một câu

shots.content: Close on an ornate vintage bronze vanity mirror in a dim red-candlelit opulent Chinese bedroom; reflected in the mirror is the face of a stunningly beautiful young Chinese woman in an ornate red traditional wedding dress staring at her own unfamiliar reflection with shock and disbelief, one trembling hand half-raised toward the glass, warm candlelight, NO second person in the room. Cinematic landscape framing of the mirror.

captions.local: Gương mặt trong gương không phải tôi

captions.zh: 这一身红，是新娘的衣服
captions.local: Bộ đồ đỏ này là áo cưới tân nương
Tôi đang ở trong thân xác của ai

shots.content: A tall, coldly handsome young Chinese man in an impeccable dark charcoal suit stands beside a red wedding bed looking down with an icy detached gaze, dim opulent mansion bedroom with warm red candlelight; in the blurred foreground the bride is seen only from behind over her shoulder wearing the SAME ornate RED traditional Chinese wedding dress with gold embroidery covering her shoulders and back (NO bare shoulders, NO white clothing), her long black hair loose, her face NOT visible. He is the only face in frame. Cinematic medium shot. Landscape.

captions.local: Cô tỉnh rồi
Anh ta đang nói gì
Nhìn mặt anh ta, đoán không ra lành dữ

shots.content: The tall coldly handsome young Chinese man in a dark charcoal suit pauses at the tall carved wooden bedroom door, half-turned looking back over his shoulder with a cold detached side glance, one hand on the door, dim red-candlelit opulent mansion bedroom behind him, he is the only person and only face in frame. Cinematic landscape shot.

captions.pinyin: míng tiān yī shēng lái gěi nǐ fù chá
captions.local: Mai bác sĩ đến khám lại cho cô
Anh ta bỏ lại một tràng dài rồi đi
chẳng một chữ nào lọt vào tai tôi

shots.content: Full-body luxury fashion-editorial wide shot of the sweet young Chinese maid Xiao Tao with straight bangs and a sleek low ponytail with face-framing strands, slim slender long-legged figure — wearing a fashionable, tastefully sexy TWO-PIECE look styled by a celebrity fashion stylist: an ivory silk-satin camisole with delicate THIN spaghetti straps and fine French lace trim along the neckline, with a soft luxurious sheen, fitted and slightly cropped to bare a sliver of her slim waist (NOT a plain cotton tank top, NOT thick straps, NOT a bustier, NOT a cheap dance costume), paired with a SEPARATE high-waisted dusty-blue silk-satin mini skirt with a subtle side slit draping elegantly over her hips (NOT a pleated school skirt), a delicate thin gold waist chain, small gold hoop earrings and a dainty gold pendant necklace, strappy nude high heels, subtle elegant makeup with glossy lips — like a Vogue high-fashion editorial / luxury lookbook, trendy, elegant, tastefully sexy, SFW — showing her very fair slim long bare legs. Her skin is uniformly very fair porcelain-pale, the EXACT same pale tone on her face, neck, shoulders, arms, hands, legs and feet, NO two-tone skin, NO tanned or ruddy or yellowish limbs, NO color mismatch, NO tan lines. She stands facing the camera anxiously MIMING a doctor taking a pulse: two fingers of one hand pressed onto the wrist of her other raised arm, eyebrows raised urgently, mouth open mid-word, worried earnest eyes, warm candlelit opulent Chinese mansion bedroom blurred behind her, completely ALONE in the frame, NO other person, NO listener visible, her whole body visible with high heels on the floor in correct realistic proportion. Cinematic full-body shot. Landscape.

captions.local: Một cô hầu nhỏ lao vào phòng

captions.zh: 太太，明天医生要来复查
captions.pinyin: tài tai míng tiān yī shēng yào lái fù chá
captions.local: Phu nhân, mai bác sĩ đến khám lại đấy
Cô ấy ra hiệu như đang bắt mạch
Là thầy thuốc sắp đến khám tôi sao

shots.content: The stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride wearing the SAME ornate RED traditional Chinese wedding dress with gold embroidery sits small and alone on the edge of a huge carved wedding bed in a vast dim opulent mansion bedroom, hugging her own arms, wide frightened eyes staring into the dark, tall red dragon-phoenix candles flickering, camera pulled far back showing the lonely grand room around her, completely ALONE, her single face in frame. Cinematic wide landscape shot.

captions.local: Tôi hé miệng là lộ ngay
Cô dâu giả chẳng nghe hiểu ai nói gì
làm sao qua mắt được thầy thuốc
Theo dõi tập sau nhé
